posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
**Who (what type of role or team) is the feature for?

Project managers, solution engineers

**What is their goal?

When creating a doc using the Files column, we need to be able to use a doc template, so that our docs can be standardized and linked to an item.

Currently, Workdocs on the Files column cannot be saved as templates. Only default templates are available when using WorkDocs in the Files column.
